2604.19351.title: DASH-KV: Accelerating Long-Context LLM Inference via Asymmetric KV Cache Hashing
2604.19351.paper_summary: The quadratic computational complexity of the standard attention mechanism constitutes a fundamental bottleneck for large language models in long-context inference. While existing KV cache compression methods alleviate memory pressure, they often sacrifice generation quality and fail to address the high overhead of floating-point arithmetic. This paper introduces DASH-KV, an innovative acceleration framework that reformulates attention as approximate nearest-neighbor search via asymmetric deep hashing. Under this paradigm, we design an asymmetric encoding architecture that differentially maps queries and keys to account for their distinctions in precision and reuse characteristics. To balance efficiency and accuracy, we further introduce a dynamic mixed-precision mechanism that adaptively retains full-precision computation for critical tokens. Extensive experiments on LongBench demonstrate that DASH-KV significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baseline methods while matching the performance of full attention, all while reducing inference complexity from O(N^2) to linear O(N). The code is available at https://github.com/Zhihan-Zh/DASH-KV
2604.19351.paper_summary_zh: 標準注意力機制的二次計算複雜度構成了大型語言模型在長上下文推理中的根本瓶頸。雖然現有的KV緩存壓縮方法減輕了內存壓力，但它們往往犧牲生成質量，並未解決浮點運算的高開銷。本文介紹了DASH-KV，一個創新的加速框架，通過非對稱深度哈希將注意力重新表述為近似最近鄰搜索。在這一範式下，我們設計了一種非對稱編碼架構，根據查詢和鍵在精度和重用特性上的區別進行差異映射。為了平衡效率和準確性，我們進一步引入了一種動態混合精度機制，根據需要自適應地保留關鍵標記的全精度計算。在LongBench上的大量實驗表明，DASH-KV顯著超越了最先進的基準方法，同時匹配全注意力的性能，並將推理複雜度從O(N^2)降低到線性O(N)。代碼可在https://github.com/Zhihan-Zh/DASH-KV獲得。
2604.19351.author: Jinyu Guo et.al.
2604.19351.authors: Jinyu Guo, Zhihan Zhang, Yutong Li, Jiehui Xie, Md. Tamim Iqbal, Dongshen Han, Lik-Hang Lee, Sung-Ho Bae, Jie Zou, Yang Yang, Chaoning Zhang
